---
title: "Filtering Data"
author: "Justin Lamb"
date: "2026-03-02"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Load Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library (dplyr)
library(boxr)
set.seed(123)
library(raster)
library(sp)
library(dismo)
library(lubridate)

```

Filter Data
```{r}
## remove NA

mosquito_na<-na.omit(mosquito_data)

## filter species of interest

mosquito_int <- mosquito_na |>
  filter(Species == "Aedes aegypti" | 
           Species == "Culex tarsalis"|
           Species == "Culex quinquefasciatus")
```

Add 'Week' Column
```{r}
mosquito_int <- mosquito_int %>%
  mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    Week = isoweek(Date)
  ) %>%
  relocate(Week, .after = 1)
```
